reviews.review_title: VR needs more runner games like this
reviews.review_description:
Been following this project for about a year. The devs have overhauled most of the game, making the levels more fun to play, the interactions easier to use plus some new additions. The glider in particular is fun to use :)

Would love to see more levels that are slightly less linear/have more than one path to take. They don't have to be completely branching paths but having an option of an upper/lower/side path you can switch to is great. Some of the newer levels kinda hinted at this direction and those were always the most fun to play.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for your review and your feedback, glad to hear you liked the game. I've just uploaded major update. Enjoy!
Few paths can be delivered as a very last stage since I'm still changing the game quite significantly.
Roman.
P.S. More levels and features coming soon.

reviews.review_description: Amazing little game reminds me of a mix of  Beat blaster, and Brisk Square.  I Love games like this.  Awesome game thanks guys.😉👍

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your review, I've checked 'Beat blaster' never heard about it before this was quite interesting and valuable. Roman.

reviews.review_title: Runner that I can actually play
reviews.review_description: It's kind of action-platformer but from first person view. Very polished demo. Liked it a lot. Played almost an hour and it felt like an hour in a gym. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for your review and your feedback, I've just uploaded major update with whole 20 new levels, reviewed gameplay and controls.
Roman.
P.S. More levels and features coming soon.

reviews.review_title: Void Ninja is a serious hidden gem
reviews.review_description:
Full Video Review - https://youtu.be/xKbJs8USEzs 

Void Ninja is a procedural free runner in the sense you are always moving forward, moving or tilting your head left and right, ducking and weaving around blocks, using Katanas to Slice enemies, a gripping and sliding motion to turn, two fists thrust downwards to jump, hitting buttons, walls to climb or slide along, hook shots to swing on, bullets to dodge, and my personal favorite a Bow and Arrow to get those pesky far away baddies.

While I had a little bit of a struggle to get used to the jumping and turning motions, once I got a better hang of it I was able to get through the levels with ease. 

Visually the title looks rather basic with some nice retro appeal, the enemies are untextured and there is well, a lot of yellow. If your willing to make your own levels this has serious excite bike level editor vibes too and I can easily see someone spending hours making the perfect levels to play.  

In conclusion I found the title to be entertaining engaging and offering a fair level of challenge with checkpoints. I enjoyed using all the different elements of the game especially the bow and the hook shot. It has great music, a cool level editor and because the levels are randomly generated it offers good replayability. The aspects of the game I wasn't so hot about really came down to frustrations getting used to the turning and jumping parts. I also found the graphical style to be lacking enough variety and detail to keep my attention for long play sessions. Its a fun game and I think its worth playing.

developer_response.body: Hi Lipnox, thanks again for your full review of the game! Roman.
Hi, thank you for your review, this is rather valuable feedback. What would you like to see in next versions at first place? More levels or more features? Improved graphics? Roman.

reviews.review_description: Love the game play and mechanics of the game, only problem is after I finish tutorial I can’t find a panel to play randomly generated levels only level editor. Also possible idea is once you get to a certain point a boss fight but still endless. As well as a score so we can try to beat our last point. Otherwise great game can’t wait to play more!

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your review and your feedback, every time you enter a door new level will be generated from some existing short level parts. Roman.

reviews.review_description: Great game, loved learning the mechanics! Had a couple issues with jumping on occaision where it would throw me off way to the side when um trying to go straight, but for a free game this is amazing. Please add levels, would happily pay for this type of content :)

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for your review and your feedback, happy to report jump issue now fixed, or at least it working significantly better. Roman.
P.S. I saw your comment for the paid version, just duplicating the answer here, thanks for supporting the game!

reviews.review_title: excited for the full game, one thing
reviews.review_description:
the gameplay of this is already very fun, I think the full version (I suppose this is just a beta/demo)
is gonna be great.

I have one reccomendation though.
I keep pulling out swords/drawing bow accidentally while doing other things.
An easy way to solve this would be remapping all weapon related stuff to trigger instead of the grab button.
This would make it so triggers are for using weapons and grab for movement.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for your review and suggestion. Yeah, that was done for the reasons. But what's not the first time I receive such suggestion, so it's probably I'll add different buttons as an option. Roman.

reviews.review_description: Me and my friend LOVE this game it’s so fun and you actually need SKILL so try out this game it’s amazing

developer_response.body: Hi, really appreciate this, glad you've liked the game :-). Let me know what kind of updates you would like to see in the next versions. Roman.
